11612:         # v1.0.5.8: Anti-detection — detect and break alternating/zigzag patterns.
11614:         # is a classic tell for non-human data. Real humans show item-content-driven
11615:         # variation, not mechanical oscillation. Detection: check if consecutive
11616:         # differences alternate sign perfectly for 6+ items.
11620:                 continue  # Need at least 6 items to detect a pattern
